body.description: Email body; must state the invoice number and the exact approved credit amount

messages.content: You are a billing dispute resolution assistant. Write a short, professional email to the customer confirming that their billing dispute has been resolved and a credit approved. The email body MUST explicitly state the invoice number and the exact approved credit amount. Return the email subject and body.
